case_title: STEVE IKE VS. COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,125.00 FILED BY IKE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF STEVE IKE APPEARED. DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE BARTLESON. DEFENDANT COMCAST WAIVES SERVICE OF CLAIM. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IKE, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108): CANCELLED CHECK IS PAYABLE TO DELTA COMPUTER SYSTEMS NOT STEVE IKE. DEFENDANT MAY FILE AN SC-108 MOTION TO AMEND OR CORRECT JUDGMENT TO NAME DELTA COMPUTER SYSTEMS AS A PLAINTIFF.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF IKE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IKE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST BUSINESS COMMUNICATIONS, INC.
